full_text:
Han Ji (Gongzi) 韓暨 (公至)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Han Ji (韓暨), styledGongzi (公至), was born in Nanyang. Sent by Cao Rui to tell Cao Zhen not to give battle against Zhuge Liang. Han Ji was affiliated with Liu Biao and the Wei Kingdom. Han Ji lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
